articles.title: The AI Hype Index: AI gets booed in graduation season
articles.summary: It is one thing to say AI will change the world. It is another to expect the class of 2026 to applaud it. In fact, when former Google CEO Eric Schmidt told University of Arizona graduates that their task is to help shape AI, he was met with a resounding chorus of boos. “I can hear you,” he said, before conceding that fears about disappearing jobs and a broken future were “rational.” This is not exactly the message one hopes to hear while sweating under a polyester gown and tallying student loan payments. Graduates have been jeering at AI pep talks at other commencements too, including ceremonies at the University of Central Florida and Middle Tennessee State University. Still, increasingly loud skepticism hasn’t stopped OpenAI from winning court cases, raising enormous sums of money, and l
articles.title_zh: AI 炒作指數：AI 在畢業季遭到嘘聲
articles.summary_zh: 說 AI 將改變世界是一回事，期望 2026 年畢業班為此歡呼則是另一回事。事實上，前 Google CEO Eric Schmidt 告訴亞利桑那大學畢業生他們的任務是幫助塑造 AI 時，卻遭到一陣陣嘘聲。

articles.title: Percona celebrates 20th birthday with new foundation — and a goat cake
articles.summary: Percona , which makes a popular open-source database-as-a-service (DBaaS), celebrated its 20th birthday this week with a rebrand, a new supporting non-profit foundation – and a birthday cake shaped like a goat. The event was held here in Mountain View, California, at the Computer History Museum , and the GOAT (Greatest Of All Time) cake was the star of the show, implying that open-source DBs are the greatest in the IT business. If you look at the number of DB deployments in production around the world, there’s no question that open source databases far outnumber proprietary systems. MySQL and PostgreSQL have ranked first and second, respectively, in the global market for several years. The OurSQL Foundation’s key function is to provide a venue for those involved in the My

articles.title: Why OpenAI and Anthropic are hiring forward deployed engineer teams
articles.summary: Companies adding AI to their products often think that a powerful model is the key to successful integration. This assumption holds for early-stage use cases, where using an API can quickly demonstrate value. However, it stops working once AI becomes part of larger systems that different teams depend on. At that point, the biggest challenge is making the model work reliably within existing infrastructure alongside internal data, legacy software, compliance rules and workflows that were never designed for AI. MIT’s NANDA Initiative studied 300 public AI projects and found that 95 percent of enterprise AI pilots produced little or no measurable impact on profit and loss. The problem was not the models, but how they were put into use. When AI companies like OpenAI and Anthropic began ro

articles.title: The agentic identity crisis: Why your security isn’t ready for the AI revolution
articles.summary: The transition from traditional web applications to agentic ecosystems is more than a change in the UI; it is a fundamental shift in the internet’s threat model. We are moving from a world where “bad input creates bad data” to one where “bad input creates bad actions.” As AI agents evolve from simple chatbots to autonomous conductors capable of calling APIs, reading sensitive files, and sending emails, our legacy security models are cracking under the pressure. If you are building or deploying AI agents today, you are likely sitting on an IAM problem in disguise, considering that agents are outnumbering humans 144:1 . In a recent global Enterprise Management Associates (EMA) survey on agentic, 95% of participants were in production or limited pilot programs us

articles.title: Debugging the undebuggable: building observability into probabilistic AI systems
articles.summary: Debugging used to be straightforward: A service failed, you checked the logs, followed the stack trace, and fixed the bug. Unfortunately, with AI systems, especially those powered by LLMs and agent workflows, that approach breaks down quickly. The problem doesn’t just lie in a more complex system. It’s complicated by the fact that failures are no longer deterministic. The system may return a different answer for the same input. A tool might silently fail. Retrieval might return low-quality or noisy context. Nothing overtly “crashes,” but something is clearly wrong. This tutorial focuses on a practical question: How do we debug a system that doesn’t fail in obvious ways?  To tackle this question, we’ll build a small AI service and, more importantly,

(Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 英偉達 CEO 在台灣為合作夥伴舉辦晚宴
articles.summary_zh: 英偉達 CEO Jensen Huang 在台北舉辦的晚宴活動上簽名，該活動被稱為「萬億美元宴會」，是 Huang 訪問台灣合作夥伴時定期舉辦的活動。

articles.title: Emerging Market Currencies Jump on Report of US-Iran Pact
articles.summary: Emerging-market currencies jumped on a report that Iran and the US have reached a deal to extend a truce and work toward an agreement to end the war.
articles.title_zh: 關於美伊協議報告推高新興市場貨幣
articles.summary_zh: 根據伊朗和美國達成延期停火並致力於結束戰爭協議的報告，新興市場貨幣大幅上漲。

articles.title: Private Credit Snubs $2.5 Billion Deal by Thoma Bravo’s Sophos
articles.summary: Just last year, private credit firms were falling over themselves to lend to software borrowers like Sophos. Now, AI anxiety has snarled up the market so much that Thoma Bravo’s $2.5 billion refinancing for the cybersecurity firm is facing hesitant lenders.
articles.title_zh: 私募信貸拒絕 Thoma Bravo 旗下 Sophos 的 25 億美元交易
articles.summary_zh: 去年私募信貸公司還在爭相向 Sophos 等軟體借款人放貸，但現在 AI 焦慮已導致市場陷入混亂，Thoma Bravo 為該網路安全公司提供的 25 億美元再融資面臨貸款方的猶豫。

articles.title: Caesars Entertainment Agrees to Buyout; Snowflake Soars on Outlook | Stock Movers
articles.summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with John Tucker: - Apple (APPL) is moving on news the next iPhone, iPad and Mac software updates will feature a revamped Siri interface and a new chatbot-style app. The new Siri will include features such as the ability to understand personal data and analyze on-screen content, a rebuilt model using Google Gemini technology, and AI-powered web search.
- Caesars Entertainment (CZR) shares are on the move as the company agreed to be bought by Fertitta Entertainment Inc. in a $5.7 billion, all-cash deal. Caesars shareholders will get $31 a share in cash, which represents a 49% premium over Caesars’ stock price on Feb. 25.
- Snowflake (SNOW) is soaring after the software maker gave a stronger-than-expected annual outlook and signed a $6 billion multiyear agreem
articles.title_zh: 凱撒娛樂同意被收購；Snowflake 因預期上漲 | 股票行情
articles.summary_zh: 本集股票行情節目中：蘋果因下一代 iPhone、iPad 和 Mac 軟體更新將采用改進的 Siri 介面和新的聊天機器人應用而上漲。

articles.title: Waymo to Deploy Robotaxi Built With Zeekr to Expand Public Rides
articles.summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Waymo unit will deploy a new autonomous vehicle designed specifically for robotaxi use, offering public rides in California and Arizona without human supervision.
articles.title_zh: Waymo 將部署與 Zeekr 共同開發的機器人出租車以擴展公共乘車服務
articles.summary_zh: Alphabet Inc. 的 Waymo 部門將部署一款專為機器人出租車用途設計的新型自動駕駛汽車，在加州和亞利桑那州提供無人類監督的公共乘車服務。

articles.title: Tilman Fertitta’s Years-Long Pursuit of Caesars Is Paying Off
articles.summary: Real estate mogul Tilman Fertitta’s years-long quest to buy Caesars Entertainment Inc. is finally paying off: His firm struck a $5.7 billion, all-cash deal for the Las Vegas company on Thursday that will add some 52 casinos in the US to his entertainment empire.
articles.title_zh: Tilman Fertitta 多年收購凱撒娛樂的追求終於獲得回報
articles.summary_zh: 房地產大亨 Tilman Fertitta 多年來收購凱撒娛樂公司的努力終於獲得回報：他的公司週四以 57 億美元全現金交易成功收購這家拉斯維加斯公司，將為其娛樂帝國增加約 52 家美國賭場。

articles.title: Snowflake CEO Weighs In on Sales Outlook, Signing $6 Billion Deal With Amazon
articles.summary: Snowflake Inc. shares jumped after the software maker gave a stronger-than-expected annual outlook and signed a $6 billion multiyear agreement to use Amazon’s cloud services and chips. Snowflake CEO Sridhar Ramaswamy speaks to Bloomberg's Matt Miller and Caroline Hyde about the results and how it will work with Amazon. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Snowflake CEO 就銷售前景發表看法，與亞馬遜簽署 60 億美元交易
articles.summary_zh: Snowflake Inc. 股票在該軟體製造商給出超預期年度預期並與亞馬遜簽署 60 億美元多年協議後大幅上漲，Snowflake CEO Sridhar Ramaswamy 就此發表評論。

articles.title: Goldman's Wheeler Sees 'Generational Opportunity' in AI
articles.summary: Miriam Wheeler, Goldman Sachs global head of leverage finance, says investors are focused on hard assets associated with the infrastructure buildout of artificial intelligence and this is a "generational opportunity." Wheeler says power demand for data centers will double over the next few years. She speaks to Dani Burger on Bloomberg Open Interest. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: 高盛 Wheeler 認為 AI 是「世代級機會」
articles.summary_zh: 高盛全球槓桿融資主管 Miriam Wheeler 表示，投資者專注於與人工智能基礎設施建設相關的硬資產，這是一個「世代級機會」。

articles.title: The DOJ Wants to Know Who on Reddit and X Is Criticizing ICE's Tactics
articles.summary: In seeking identities of those behind anonymous social media posts, the Trump administration is intensifying its pursuit using grand jury subpoenas.
articles.title_zh: 司法部想知道 Reddit 和 X 上誰在批評 ICE 的戰術
articles.summary_zh: 在尋求匿名社交媒體帖子發布者身份時，川普政府正在通過大陪審團傳票加強其追蹤力度。

articles.title: AI Is a ‘Capacity Creator’ for BNY, CEO Vince Says
articles.summary: Robin Vince, CEO at BNY, describes himself as an “AI optimist” as he explains how the technology fits into the firm’s plans over the next five years. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: AI 是 BNY 的「容量創造者」，CEO Vince 表示
articles.summary_zh: BNY CEO Robin Vince 將自己稱為「AI 樂觀主義者」，解釋該技術如何融入公司未來五年的計畫中。

articles.title: France Braces for Peak Heat as Power Demand Rises
articles.summary: The deadly heat wave gripping northwest Europe is set to intensify in Spain and France, lifting power demand for cooling and threatening fresh temperature records.
articles.title_zh: 法國應對電力需求上升之際迎戰高溫
articles.summary_zh: 肆虐西北歐的致命熱浪將在西班牙和法國加劇，推高冷卻用電需求並威脅破紀錄高溫。

articles.title: European Banks Could Cut 20% of Jobs on AI, Morgan Stanley Says
articles.summary: The rapid spread of artificial intelligence may enable European banks to reduce their headcount by as much as a fifth over the “shorter term,” according to Morgan Stanley analysts.
articles.title_zh: 摩根士丹利：歐洲銀行可能因 AI 裁員 20%
articles.summary_zh: 根據摩根士丹利分析師的說法，人工智能的快速普及可能使歐洲銀行在「短期內」將員工數量減少五分之一。

articles.title: Apple to Overhaul iOS 27 Siri, AI Features: Here's a First Peek
articles.summary: The iPhone maker looks to stage a comeback in digital assistants and artificial intelligence.
articles.title_zh: Apple 將改革 iOS 27 Siri、AI 功能：首次預覽
articles.summary_zh: iPhone 製造商尋求在數位助理和人工智能領域重新奪回市場地位。

articles.title: Oura Ring 5 Is 40% Smaller, Detects Blood Pressure Changes and Sleep Disturbances
articles.summary: Oura Health Oy, the popular smart ring maker seeking to go public this year, unveiled a significantly thinner and lighter new model along with new wellness features.
articles.title_zh: Oura Ring 5 體積縮小 40%，可偵測血壓變化和睡眠障礙
articles.summary_zh: 知名智慧戒指製造商 Oura Health Oy 推出明顯更薄更輕的新型號，搭配新的健康監測功能，該公司計畫今年上市。

articles.title: Architect Set to Launch US-Listed Compute Futures in Challenge to CME, NYSE-owner
articles.summary: Architect Financial Technologies, an offshore derivatives exchange operator, has bought a US-regulated trading venue as it seeks to launch a futures market in computing power and other artificial intelligence commodities.
articles.title_zh: Architect 擬推美國上市計算期貨，挑戰 CME、紐交所母公司
articles.summary_zh: 離岸衍生品交易所營運商 Architect Financial Technologies 收購美國監管交易場所，尋求推出計算能力及其他 AI 商品期貨市場。

articles.title: Boston Seizes on California Billionaire Tax to Lure AI Talent
articles.summary: The talent at some of America’s hottest artificial intelligence companies often passes through Boston-area universities before heading west to build billion-dollar businesses in Silicon Valley. Massachusetts business and political leaders say California’s proposed tax on billionaires is an opportunity to change that.
articles.title_zh: 波士頓利用加州億萬富翁稅吸引 AI 人才
articles.summary_zh: 美國一些最熱門 AI 公司的人才常經由波士頓地區大學，然後前往西部矽谷創立數十億美元事業；麻州商業和政治領袖表示加州提議的億萬富翁稅是機遇。

articles.title: Snowflake Had Seminal Quarter for Software, Dan Ives Says
articles.summary: Dan Ives, global head of tech research and senior equity analyst at Wedbush Securities, examines second-quarter earnings from Snowflake and the pressure he sees on Salesforce to monetize 15% to 20% of their customer base over the next “two, three, four quarters.” (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Snowflake 在軟體業創造關鍵季度，Dan Ives 表示
articles.summary_zh: Wedbush Securities 全球技術研究主管兼資深股票分析師 Dan Ives，分析 Snowflake 第二季財報，並指出 Salesforce 在未來「兩、三、四季」內需要變現 15% 至 20% 客戶基礎的壓力。

articles.title: Meta Eyes AI Subscriptions While AI Rivals Target Meta’s Ad Business
articles.summary: The social giant wants to make money from its chatbot, but its core business may be at risk.
articles.title_zh: Meta 眼拓 AI 訂閱，AI 競對鎖定 Meta 廣告業務
articles.summary_zh: 社交巨頭欲透過聊天機器人創收，但核心業務可能面臨風險。

articles.title: Trump loses more control over AI regulation as Illinois passes landmark law
articles.summary: A few days after President Donald Trump abruptly canceled a plan that would have given the federal government power to vet frontier AI models over fears that it might hobble innovation, Illinois lawmakers passed the nation's strongest AI safety law. On Wednesday, the Illinois legislature passed SB 315 . If Illinois Governor J.B. Pritzker signs the bill into law, the largest AI firms would be required to submit public safety plans and annual reports summarizing the results of independent, third-party safety testing of their frontier models. They would also have to report any critical safety incidents to the state within 72 hours—or within 24 hours if there's potentially "an imminent risk of death or serious physical harm." And their employees will have a clear avenue for reporting emerging
articles.title_zh: Trump 對 AI 監管控制力減弱，伊利諾州通過里程碑式法案
articles.summary_zh: 在 Trump 總統因擔心可能阻礙創新而突然取消聯邦政府審查前沿 AI 模型的計畫數天後，伊利諾州議員通過該國最嚴格的 AI 安全法。

articles.title: Steam Deck sells out in North America within 24 hours of price hike
articles.summary: Well, that was fast. Less than 24 hours after Valve announced renewed availability of the Steam Deck OLED (at a massively increased MSRP), the handheld is once again listed as "out of stock" in the US and Canada. Spot checks of other regional Steam stores on Thursday morning showed the hardware as still available across Europe and Australia for the time being, as well as in Asian countries through Valve's sales partner Komodo. While it's hard to know from the outside just how many Steam Deck units sold at the new inflated price, those sales were enough to once again boost the hardware to the top of Steam's Top Sellers list . That list is based on total revenue over the last 24 hours , though, so the $789 Steam Deck could easily have sold many fewer distinct copies than the highest-ranked s
articles.title_zh: Steam Deck 在價格上調後 24 小時內在北美售罄
articles.summary_zh: 在 Valve 宣布 Steam Deck OLED 重新供應（大幅提高建議零售價）不到 24 小時後，該掌機在美國和加拿大再次標示為「缺貨」狀態。

articles.title: Bad cholesterol slashed 62% by single dose of gene-editing drug in small trial
articles.summary: An experimental gene-editing therapy that aims to lower bad cholesterol for the long-term after a single infusion is off to a positive start in an early clinical trial. Researchers running a Phase I safety trial for the drug, dubbed VERVE-102, published interim results from just 35 patients this week in the New England Journal of Medicine . Though the numbers are small and the analysis is preliminary, VERVE-102 appeared safe, with no serious adverse events reported from the treatment, even at the largest doses. The most significant finding was a temporary, mild increase in a liver enzyme that suggested minor injury in the liver, where the drug works. The small amount of data also hints that the drug is effective. The subgroup of participants who received the largest dose have seen their ba
articles.title_zh: 基因編輯藥物單一劑量將壞膽固醇降低 62%（小型試驗）
articles.summary_zh: 一項實驗性基因編輯療法在小型臨床試驗中取得正面初步成果，旨在透過單次輸液長期降低壞膽固醇。

articles.title: Forecasters predict below-average hurricane season, advise against complacency
articles.summary: Forecasters are calling for below-average activity this hurricane season, which begins Monday, June 1. The National Weather Service is predicting eight to 14 named storms, including three to six hurricanes and one to three major hurricanes of category 3, 4, or 5 strength, packing winds of 111 mph or greater. By comparison, a typical season is characterized by 14 named storms, including seven hurricanes and three major hurricanes. The season ends November 30. “It just takes one,” said Ken Graham, director of the National Weather Service. “Now is the time to start thinking about your hurricane preparedness.” Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: 預報員預測颶風季活動低於平均，勸誡勿掉以輕心
articles.summary_zh: 預報員預測本颶風季（6 月 1 日開始）活動將低於平均水準；美國國家氣象服務預估將有 8 至 14 個命名風暴，其中 3 至 6 個颶風及 1 至 3 個第 3 至 5 級大颶風。

articles.title: NetApp擴展Red Hat OpenShift平臺的資料保護支援，強化容器與VM工作負載的備份與還原能力
articles.summary:
隨著Broadcom併購VMware後的銷售政策調整，也促成虛擬化應用領域的重大變化，原本圍繞著VMware生態系建立的虛擬化相關備份、復原等資料保護應用，也逐漸擴增至其他雲端原生平臺，NetApp與Red Hat近日共同發布的OpenShift平臺備份復原解決方案，便是典型的案例。
針對Red Hat OpenShift與OpenShift Virtualization平臺的資料保護，NetApp宣布擴展兩款解決方案。

articles.title: 統一超商以AIoT、資料分析與自動化推動綠色零售，從門市節能到供應鏈導入數位治理
articles.summary:
零售業是高耗能產業，特別是24小時營運的便利商店，大量冷藏、冷凍設備與空調系統長時間運轉，加上數千家門市同時營運，如何節能減碳成為零售業者營運上的重要挑戰。
統一超商近幾年將AIoT、資料分析、自動化設備與ESG治理機制導入門市與供應鏈流程，試圖以IT系統降低能源消耗、改善資源使用效率，並建立可規模化的低碳零售模式。
在門市能源管理上，統一超商以7-ELEVEN慶城門市作為示範場域，導入AIoT能源管理系統。這套系統是透過感測器持續蒐集門市內外溫度、設備運轉與環境數據，再由後端系統分析後，動態調整冷藏、冷凍櫃與開放式冰箱的運作模式。

articles.title: 【臺灣資安大會直擊】面對開發速度暴衝引發的新挑戰，中華電信建構ChainStrike AI驗證閘門，加速資安檢測
articles.summary:
善用生成式AI強化資安已非口號，近年國內外科技大廠陸續分享早期實務經驗，今年臺灣資安大會（CYBERSEC 2026）亦有不少臺灣企業公開AI資安應用成果，其中，作為國內電信與資通訊服務龍頭的中華電信，其發展進度亦受外界關注。
身為中華電信資訊技術分公司資訊安全應用處資安產品股股長的吳明峰，針對AI驅動日常工作提出實務經驗，並針對資安檢測難以跟上開發速度的挑戰，揭露團隊打造AI資安驗證閘門的新作法。

articles.title: Veeam Backup & Replication推出13.0.2版，修補可能導致權限提升與寫入任意檔案的重大漏洞
articles.summary: 備份與資料保護軟體廠商Veeam，日前發布主力備份軟體產品Veeam Backup & Replication最新13.0.2版，除強化高可用性、遠端控制臺等功能外，也修補2項重大漏洞。這兩項漏洞影響13.0.1.2067版以前，所有Veeam Backup & Replication 13.x版，用戶應儘速更新已完成修補的13.0.2版。

articles.title: Cognition AI完成逾10億美元融資，身價竄上260億美元
articles.summary:
Cognition AI周三（5/27）宣布完成超過10億美元的D輪融資，公司估值達260億美元。這輪融資由Lux Capital、General Catalyst與8VC領投。
成立於2023年的Cognition AI總部位於美國舊金山，由Scott Wu、Steven Hao與Walden Yan共同創辦，主要產品為AI程式代理人（AI Coding Agent）Devin。Devin於2024年推出後快速受到市場關注，可自動完成撰寫程式、除錯、測試與部署等工作。

articles.title: 南山人壽推動AI數位轉型
articles.summary: 南山人壽董事長尹崇堯宣示，2023年是南山人壽的「數位賦能元年」，並以「服務賦能」與「數位賦能」作為轉型方向，高層主管也迅速做好組織對齊；但只有從上而下的數位轉型推動還不夠，2026年藉由「#WHAT-IF to #TRY-IF」的內部創新試行活動，打造由下而上的員工創新文化。

articles.title: Robinhood開放AI代理人代客交易股票與刷卡消費
articles.summary: 美國股票交易平臺Robinhood周三（5/27）宣布推出代理人交易（Agentic Trading）與代理人信用卡（Agentic Credit Card）服務，允許用戶把Claude Code、ChatGPT或Cursor等外部AI代理人接入Robinhood帳戶，由AI依照使用者指令執行股票交易或信用卡消費。

articles.title: Anthropic公布自管代理人沙箱、Claude安全指引外掛、治理工具
articles.summary:
Anthropic周三（5/27）公布Claude Managed Agents新功能，包括可讓代理人執行在企業自選雲端平臺的自管沙箱（self-hosted）及MCP通道（MCP tunnel）。
這兩項安全功能可允許Claude託管代理人運行在由企業控制的沙箱，並以MCP通道（MCP tunnel）連結到私有MCP（Model Context Protocol）伺服器。代理人執行工具的沙箱及代理人連結的服務，都是跑在企業建立的邊界內，受企業安全及runtime控制。
